instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall activate limp-home mode when critical faults occur.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall enable limp-home mode when Transmission_Fault_Level equals Critical.

expected_output: IF Transmission_Fault_Level = Critical THEN Limp_Home_Mode = Enabled
IF Transmission_Fault_Level != Critical THEN Limp_Home_Mode = Disabled
